title: Remove mood-based activity tabs from post-mood-selection view

requirements.summary: Remove the tabbed panel of mood-based resources (Music, Dance, Stories, Self Care, Meditation, What to Watch, Journaling) that appears after mood submission in ConversationInput.tsx while preserving the emotional check-in input form
acceptanceCriteria: After a user selects their mood/feeling, no tab panel with Music, Dance, Stories, Self Care, Meditation, What to Watch, or Journaling options is displayed.
The emotional check-in input form still functions correctly for submitting moods.
No broken imports or unused tab content components remain referenced in ConversationInput.tsx.

file_operations.description: Remove the tabbed panel UI and all mood-based resource tab content (Music, Dance, Stories, Self Care, Meditation, What to Watch, Journaling) that appears after mood submission. Remove the tab state management (activeTab, setActiveTab) and conditional rendering logic for the tab panel. Remove imports for tab content components (MusicTabContent, DanceTabContent, StoriesTabContent, SelfCareTabContent, MeditationTabContent, WhatToWatchTabContent, JournalingTabContent). Preserve the emotional check-in input form, voice recording functionality, and the submission flow that calls addCheckIn. Ensure the component still displays the conversation input interface without the post-submission resource tabs.
